generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
instance TrajectoryPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory planning for crane movements"
]

instance SimulationConfidenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation confidence bounds for trajectory traces"
]

instance DeviationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts when deviations exceed thresholds, enabling informed maintenance or control adjustments"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds provided by dashboard"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current crane state position and speed data"
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models",
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanningInsight
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane movements",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationConfidenceInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing measured vs. simulated trajectories",
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationAlertInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization via Grafana dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeTrajectoryInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data transmission via MQTT broker",
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Physical crane interface for sensor data processing",
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization"
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message transmission",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance GantryLibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for hardware control",
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterfaceService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD models created using Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for crane dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibEnabler
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartPositionSensor
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data from hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data from anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CartPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance HoistPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Hoist position data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing Angle Encoder to measure hoist swinging motion",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer for wind speed measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for cart movement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for hoist movement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet at hoist end for picking up pucks"
]

instance DatabaseContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Database container for TimescaleDB"
]

instance DashboardContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Dashboard container for Grafana visualization"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator container for optimal trajectory generation"
]

instance SimulationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Simulation container for crane dynamics simulation"
]

instance ContinuousValidationContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation container for comparing measured vs. simulated trajectories"
]

instance MQTTBrokerContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker container for Eclipse Mosquitto"
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartPositionSensor, HoistPositionSensor, DatabaseContainer, DashboardContainer, TrajectoryGeneratorContainer, SimulationContainer, ContinuousValidationContainer, MQTTBrokerContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service and Control Application are sent to the physical crane via the Physical Crane Interface to execute movement trajectories."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation occurring at the operational time scale, as indicated by 'continuously logs' and 'continuously compares' in the documentation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical crane components interacting via MQTT and database; includes Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, HMI, and digital twin services (DB, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation, MQTT Broker) all deployed on a single computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated'), continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane during real-time operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against thresholds; validation results displayed with confidence bounds in Grafana dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between services; TimescaleDB for persistent data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard, with Python gantrylib module handling other services."
]
